hero.subtitle: 将员工经验、业务流程与判断标准固化为可持续工作的数字员工，让 AI 从「会聊天」走向「能上岗、能执行、能进化」。

story.title: 不是又一个聊天机器人，而是一位数字同事
story.subtitle: StaffDeck 用三层能力，让 AI 从「会聊天」进化为「能上岗」。

advantages.title: 数字员工：向管理员工一样管理 AI
advantages.body: 每位数字员工都有自己的档案、岗位、技能配置与成长记录。你可以看到它服务了多少人、好评率如何、最近学会了什么——AI 不再是黑盒工具，而是一位可培养、可考核、可信赖的数字同事。

advantages.title: 流程型技能：把流程真正办到底
advantages.body: 基于状态机驱动的 SOP 技能，多个流程可实时切换、互相串联。用户中途插问、跳出流程，数字员工也能记住进度、无缝恢复，上下文不丢——不只是回答问题，而是把事情办完。

advantages.title: OKF 企业知识本体：理解业务，而非只会检索
advantages.body: 将文档沉淀为主题、规则、操作手册等结构化知识本体，回答自带出处引用。数字员工理解的是你的业务口径，而不是简单的关键词匹配。

dashboard.role: # 角色：知识运营官「StaffDeck」，一名经验丰富的知识运营官
dashboard.innovationBody: 数字员工档案 · SOP 状态机 · OKF 知识本体

hero.subtitle: Turn employee expertise, business processes, and decision criteria into digital employees that work continuously, taking AI from “able to chat” to “ready to work, execute, and evolve.”

story.title: Not another chatbot, but a digital colleague
story.subtitle: Three layers of capability take AI from conversation to execution.

advantages.title: Digital employees: manage AI like your team
advantages.body: Every digital employee has a profile, role, capability configuration, and growth record. See whom it served, how it performed, and what it learned—turning AI from a black box into a trusted colleague you can develop and evaluate.

advantages.title: Process skills: carry work through to completion
advantages.body: State-machine-driven SOP skills can switch and connect in real time. Even when a user interrupts or leaves a flow, the digital employee preserves progress and resumes without losing context—it completes work instead of merely answering questions.

advantages.title: OKF enterprise ontology: understand the business
advantages.body: Turn documents into structured topics, rules, and operating guides with traceable citations. Digital employees follow your business standards instead of relying on simple keyword matching.

features.body: Proactive work without waiting to be asked
